text:
Brotherhood is the thirteenth and final English DVD volume of the original Fullmetal Alchemist anime series, released by Funimation on September 12, 2006. It is the only Fullmetal Alchemist DVD released by Funimation which contains only three episodes:
Episode 49: The Other Side of the Gate
Episode 50: Death
Episode 51: Laws and Promises

Synopsis

The back of the DVD cover contains the following synopsis:
"At the end of destiny, after light and darkness have smeared into a dim gray haze surrounding your every thought... where will peace be found? When harsh lessons wrapped in blood and tears are learned and the journey has spread over eons and far-flung dimensions, is it possible for the mysteries to be made even murkier as the future begins? In between the rays of a warming sun, the brothers Elric will consider the answers that are left once the Philosopher's Stone has guided their saga to an end. True sacrifice, the deep love of family, the cruel truths of life and death... There is no great magic that soothes the pain and amplifies the joy of being human. As the Fullmetal Alchemist's tale draws to a close, our heroes and villains reap what they have sown."

Extras

In addition to the textless songs, production art, and trailers which regularly appear on Fullmetal Alchemist DVDs, this volume also contains actor commentary on Laws and Promises and an inside look titled The Transmutation of a Phenomenon, as well as character profiles for Hohenheim and Dante.
